name: Index Advantage NF

data_sources.note: Allianz Index Advantage NF Variable Annuity 485B filing (CIK 836346, Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America). NF = No Fee variant (no annual product fee). Predecessor to Index Advantage+ NF.

Allianz Index Advantage NF official prospectus page. 6-year B-share surrender charge starts at 7% in years 1-2 with 1% reduction per year. Spec surrender schedule 6/5/4/3/2/1 updated to 7/7/6/5/4/3 to match public broker-tier surrender description.
Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America AM Best FSR A+ (Superior). Synthetic anchor confirmed.

verification_notes: AM Best A+ confirmed; surrender schedule corrected to 7/7/6/5/4/3 per disclosed B-share structure; no annual product fee confirmed (me_fee_annual=0 retained). Specific cap rate / participation rate not pulled from current rate sheet — public-range estimates retained.
